textByHashes.92cf22a7a57a4a705c081f6cc1d1d933cb734a52: I've heard about all the things you did for us!
textByHashes.97c43d06e95baab09888ce7336ba316bd2115f24: And I'm happy that you helped us! Maybe now this place can be a bit more cheerful again!
textByHashes.64c6d0e0fbf6eb9f734a34c3fb31b9d549be96b9: I'd rather be left alone, outerlander.
